channel.title: Scheduling on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Scheduling on jamesm.blog

item.title: Data Engineering & Data Science Courses
item.description: Comprehensive curated list of data engineering and data science courses from Coursera, DataCamp, A Cloud Guru, Udacity, Google Cloud, and other platforms with learning paths and certifications.

item.title: DevOps GitHub Projects
item.description: Curated collection of essential open-source DevOps projects on GitHub - SRE learning resources, Kubernetes tooling, Linux utilities, and workflow schedulers.
